# Emoji Bar Overflow Dots Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace the static 14-emoji bar with a responsive bar that shows as many priority-ordered emojis as fit in the available width, with a ••• overflow popup, 🖥️ always visible after •••, and localStorage-based usage reordering.

**Architecture:** All emoji buttons are generated by `renderEmojiBar()` (module-level function). A `ResizeObserver` triggers re-render on bar width changes. Upload/paste buttons move inside `#emoji-bar` as fixed rightmost children. Tooltip attachment uses event delegation on `#emoji-bar` (no per-button re-attachment on re-render). Priority is stored in localStorage as use-counts and re-sorted on every tap.

**Tech Stack:** Vanilla JS (ES6+), participant.html, participant.js, participant.css — no build step.

**Scope note on global functions:** participant.js is a module-level script (no wrapper IIFE). All `function` declarations (e.g. `sendEmoji`, `openUploadModal`) are globally accessible from `onclick=""` HTML attributes. New functions added at module level follow the same pattern.

---

## File Map

| File | Changes |
|---|---|
| `static/participant.html:133-150` | Remove static emoji buttons; restructure `#emoji-bar` with fixed skeleton |
| `static/participant.js` | Add `EMOJI_CONFIG`, `renderEmojiBar()`, use-count helpers, popup toggle, `ResizeObserver`, update `sendEmoji`, convert `setupEmojiBubbles` to delegation, update `setupSlidesBubbles` selector, update onboarding |
| `static/participant.css` | Remove fixed positioning from `.upload-floating-btn` / `.paste-floating-btn`; add popup, close-btn, divider, dots, ping styles |

```html
<div id="emoji-bar">
  <!-- Dynamic emoji buttons injected here by renderEmojiBar() -->
  <div id="emoji-dots-wrap" style="display:none; position:relative; pointer-events:auto; flex-shrink:0;">
    <button id="emoji-dots-btn" class="emoji-btn emoji-btn-dots" data-tooltip="More reactions">•••</button>
    <div id="emoji-popup" class="emoji-popup" style="display:none;">
      <button class="emoji-popup-close">✕</button>
      <!-- Dynamic overflow buttons injected here by renderEmojiBar() -->
    </div>
  </div>
  <button id="emoji-ping-btn" class="emoji-btn emoji-btn-ping" data-tooltip="I can't see your screen." style="flex-shrink:0; pointer-events:auto;">🖥️</button>
  <div class="emoji-bar-divider"></div>
  <button id="upload-btn" class="emoji-btn emoji-bar-action-btn" data-tooltip="Send a file to the host." data-tooltip-emoji="📤" style="flex-shrink:0;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 13V4"/><path d="M6 7.5L10 3.5L14 7.5"/><path d="M4.5 13.5v1a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h7a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-1"/></svg></button>
  <button id="paste-btn" class="emoji-btn emoji-bar-action-btn" data-tooltip="Send text to the host." data-tooltip-emoji="📋" style="flex-shrink:0;">📋</button>
</div>
```

Note: `onclick` attributes are removed from upload-btn and paste-btn here — they will be wired via JS in Task 5. The ••• and ping onclick are also wired via JS.

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.css`

- [ ] **2a.** Find `.upload-floating-btn` (around line 2014) and `.paste-floating-btn` (around line 1910). These classes are no longer used — the buttons now use `.emoji-btn.emoji-bar-action-btn`. Delete both full CSS blocks (including their `:hover` and `:active` rules).

- [ ] **2b.** After the `.emoji-btn:active` rule (around line 1493), add:

```css
/* Dots overflow button */
.emoji-btn-dots {
  font-size: .8rem;
  color: var(--text-muted, #9090b0);
  letter-spacing: .05em;
}

/* Ping button (always visible) */
.emoji-btn-ping {
  border-color: rgba(200, 90, 20, 0.45);
}
.emoji-btn-ping:hover {
  border-color: rgba(200, 90, 20, 0.9);
}

/* Upload / paste as part of emoji bar */
.emoji-bar-action-btn {
  pointer-events: auto;
}

/* Divider between emojis and upload/paste */
.emoji-bar-divider {
  width: 1px;
  height: 24px;
  background: var(--border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Overflow popup */
.emoji-popup {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: calc(100% + 6px);
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: .45rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .3rem;
  align-items: center;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, .7);
  z-index: 3010;
  pointer-events: auto;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 80px);
  overflow-y: auto;
}

/* Small ✕ close button on popup */
.emoji-popup-close {
  position: absolute;
  top: -10px;
  right: -10px;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--text-muted, #9090b0);
  font-size: .6rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  pointer-events: auto;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0;
}
.emoji-popup-close:hover {
  color: var(--text);
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
```

- [ ] **2c.** The `#emoji-bar` CSS already uses `justify-content: center` which is fine — the fixed elements (dots, ping, divider, upload, paste) will be pushed to the end naturally since dynamic buttons fill the flex row. No change needed to `#emoji-bar` itself.

## Task 3: Add emoji config and render logic to `participant.js`

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.js` — insert near the top of the file, after the existing `const LS_*` declarations (around line 4)

- [ ] **3a.** Add `EMOJI_CONFIG` and localStorage helpers:

```js
// ── Emoji bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const EMOJI_CONFIG = [
  { emoji: '❤️', tooltip: 'Genuinely love this.' },
  { emoji: '☕', tooltip: 'I need a break. Now.' },
  { emoji: '👍', tooltip: 'Yes. More of this.' },
  { emoji: '🔥', tooltip: 'This is absolute fire.' },
  { emoji: '🤔', tooltip: 'Hmm... not convinced yet.' },
  { emoji: '⚔️', tooltip: 'Fight me on this.' },
  { emoji: '😂', tooltip: "I'm dead 💀" },
  { emoji: '🤯', tooltip: 'My brain just exploded.' },
  { emoji: '💡', tooltip: 'Wait, I have an idea!' },
  { emoji: '✅', tooltip: 'Agreed. 100%.' },
  { emoji: '❌', tooltip: 'Nope. Hard disagree.' },
];
const LS_EMOJI_COUNTS = 'emoji_use_counts';
const EMOJI_BTN_PX = 44 + 8; // button width (44px) + gap (.5rem ≈ 8px)

function getEmojiCounts() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(LS_EMOJI_COUNTS) || '{}'); }
  catch { return {}; }
}

function incrementEmojiCount(emoji) {
  const counts = getEmojiCounts();
  counts[emoji] = (counts[emoji] || 0) + 1;
  localStorage.setItem(LS_EMOJI_COUNTS, JSON.stringify(counts));
}

function getSortedEmojis() {
  const counts = getEmojiCounts();
  return [...EMOJI_CONFIG].sort((a, b) => {
    const diff = (counts[b.emoji] || 0) - (counts[a.emoji] || 0);
    return diff !== 0 ? diff : EMOJI_CONFIG.indexOf(a) - EMOJI_CONFIG.indexOf(b);
  });
}
```

- [ ] **3b.** Add `renderEmojiBar()` immediately after the helpers above:

```js
function renderEmojiBar() {
  const bar = document.getElementById('emoji-bar');
  const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('emoji-dots-wrap');
  const popup = document.getElementById('emoji-popup');
  if (!bar || !dotsWrap || !popup) return;

  // Measure space consumed by fixed elements (dots + ping + divider + upload + paste + bar padding)
  // Use actual rendered widths of fixed children so this adapts to font/zoom changes.
  const fixedEls = [dotsWrap, document.getElementById('emoji-ping-btn'),
    bar.querySelector('.emoji-bar-divider'), document.getElementById('upload-btn'),
    document.getElementById('paste-btn')];
  const fixedWidth = fixedEls.reduce((sum, el) => {
    if (!el) return sum;
    return sum + el.getBoundingClientRect().width + 8; // +8 for gap
  }, 0);
  const barPx = bar.getBoundingClientRect().width - 24; // subtract bar padding (.75rem * 2)
  const visibleCount = Math.min(
    Math.max(0, Math.floor((barPx - fixedWidth) / EMOJI_BTN_PX)),
    EMOJI_CONFIG.length
  );

  const sorted = getSortedEmojis();
  const visible = sorted.slice(0, visibleCount);
  const overflow = sorted.slice(visibleCount);

  // Remove existing dynamic emoji buttons
  bar.querySelectorAll('.emoji-btn-dynamic').forEach(el => el.remove());

  // Insert visible emoji buttons before #emoji-dots-wrap
  visible.forEach(({ emoji, tooltip }) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'emoji-btn emoji-btn-dynamic';
    btn.dataset.tooltip = tooltip;
    btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
    btn.style.flexShrink = '0';
    btn.textContent = emoji;
    btn.onclick = (ev) => sendEmoji(emoji, ev);
    bar.insertBefore(btn, dotsWrap);
  });

  // Show/hide ••• and populate popup overflow buttons
  const hasOverflow = overflow.length > 0;
  dotsWrap.style.display = hasOverflow ? '' : 'none';

  // Remove old overflow buttons from popup (keep .emoji-popup-close)
  popup.querySelectorAll('.emoji-popup-btn').forEach(el => el.remove());
  const closeBtn = popup.querySelector('.emoji-popup-close');
  overflow.forEach(({ emoji, tooltip }) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'emoji-btn emoji-popup-btn';
    btn.dataset.tooltip = tooltip;
    btn.style.cssText = 'width:36px;height:36px;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;pointer-events:auto;';
    btn.textContent = emoji;
    btn.onclick = (ev) => { sendEmoji(emoji, ev); closeEmojiPopup(); };
    popup.insertBefore(btn, closeBtn ? closeBtn.nextSibling : null);
  });
}

function toggleEmojiPopup(ev) {
  if (ev) ev.stopPropagation();
  const popup = document.getElementById('emoji-popup');
  if (!popup) return;
  popup.style.display = popup.style.display === 'none' ? 'flex' : 'none';
}

function closeEmojiPopup(ev) {
  if (ev) ev.stopPropagation();
  const popup = document.getElementById('emoji-popup');
  if (popup) popup.style.display = 'none';
}
```

## Task 4: Update `sendEmoji` to track usage

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.js` — around line 2962 (will shift after Task 3 insertions)

- [ ] Find `function sendEmoji(emoji, ev) {` and add two lines after `ws.send(...)`:

```js
function sendEmoji(emoji, ev) {
  if (!ws) return;
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'emoji_reaction', emoji }));
  // Track usage for priority reordering (only for overflow-eligible emojis)
  if (EMOJI_CONFIG.some(e => e.emoji === emoji)) {
    incrementEmojiCount(emoji);
    renderEmojiBar();
  }
  const btn = ev && ev.currentTarget;
  // ... rest of existing code unchanged ...
```

## Task 5: Wire up DOMContentLoaded initialization

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.js` — inside the DOMContentLoaded handler (around line 3826)

- [ ] Find the DOMContentLoaded handler and add at the START of it (right after the opening `() => {`):

```js
// Wire onclick for buttons now inside #emoji-bar
document.getElementById('emoji-dots-btn').onclick = toggleEmojiPopup;
document.getElementById('emoji-ping-btn').onclick = (ev) => sendEmoji('🖥️', ev);
document.getElementById('emoji-popup').querySelector('.emoji-popup-close').onclick = closeEmojiPopup;
document.getElementById('upload-btn').onclick = openUploadModal;
document.getElementById('paste-btn').onclick = openPasteModal;

// Initial render
renderEmojiBar();

// Re-render on bar resize
new ResizeObserver(() => { closeEmojiPopup(); renderEmojiBar(); })
  .observe(document.getElementById('emoji-bar'));

// Close popup on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
  const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('emoji-dots-wrap');
  if (dotsWrap && !dotsWrap.contains(ev.target)) closeEmojiPopup();
});
```

---

## Task 6: Convert `setupEmojiBubbles` to event delegation

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.js` — `setupEmojiBubbles` IIFE (around line 3829)

The existing `setupEmojiBubbles` IIFE attaches mouseenter/mouseleave listeners to each emoji button individually. Since `renderEmojiBar()` replaces DOM nodes on every re-render, those listeners are lost. Fix: switch to event delegation on `#emoji-bar`.

- [ ] Find `showBubble` inside `setupEmojiBubbles` (~line 3838). Update line that reads the emoji icon so it falls back to `data-tooltip-emoji` for SVG buttons (upload):

```js
// change:
const emoji = btn.textContent.trim();
// to:
const emoji = btn.dataset.tooltipEmoji || btn.textContent.trim();
```

- [ ] Find the block inside `setupEmojiBubbles`:

```js
document.querySelectorAll('#emoji-bar .emoji-btn[data-tooltip]').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    showTimer = setTimeout(() => showBubble(btn), 100);
  });
  btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', removeBubble);
  btn.addEventListener('click', removeBubble);
});
```

Replace with:

```js
const emojiBarEl = document.getElementById('emoji-bar');
emojiBarEl.addEventListener('mouseenter', (ev) => {
  const btn = ev.target.closest('.emoji-btn[data-tooltip]');
  if (!btn) return;
  showTimer = setTimeout(() => showBubble(btn), 100);
}, true);
emojiBarEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', (ev) => {
  const btn = ev.target.closest('.emoji-btn[data-tooltip]');
  if (btn) removeBubble();
}, true);
emojiBarEl.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
  if (ev.target.closest('.emoji-btn[data-tooltip]')) removeBubble();
}, true);
```

## Task 8: Update onboarding tour emoji steps

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/participant.js` — `_ALL_EMOJI_STEPS` array (around line 147)

- [ ] Replace the hardcoded `_ALL_EMOJI_STEPS` array with one derived from `EMOJI_CONFIG`. Then filter to only buttons currently visible in the bar (not in the popup):

```js
const _ALL_EMOJI_STEPS = EMOJI_CONFIG.map(({ emoji, tooltip }) => ({
  selector: `#emoji-bar .emoji-btn-dynamic[data-tooltip="${tooltip}"]`,
  emoji,
  text: tooltip,
}));
const _available = _ALL_EMOJI_STEPS.filter(s => document.querySelector(s.selector));
const _shuffled = (_available.length >= 4 ? _available : _ALL_EMOJI_STEPS)
  .slice().sort(() => Math.random() - .5).slice(0, 4);
```

Replace the subsequent usage of `_shuffled` in the STEPS array construction — it should already use `_shuffled`, so no further change needed there.

## Task 9: Manual smoke test + commit

- [ ] Start local server: `python3 -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000`
- [ ] Open http://localhost:8000 in a normal-width browser window
- [ ] Verify: 5 emojis (❤️ ☕ 👍 🔥 🤔) visible, then •••, then 🖥️, then divider, then 📤, then 📋
- [ ] Click ••• → popup opens with 6 emojis stacked vertically; small ✕ in top-right corner of popup
- [ ] Click ✕ → popup closes
- [ ] Click outside popup → popup closes
- [ ] Click ⚔️ from popup → emoji fires, ⚔️ promoted into visible bar, popup closes
- [ ] Hover any visible emoji → tooltip bubble appears above button
- [ ] Hover 📤 and 📋 → tooltip appears (emoji bubble, not slides bubble)
- [ ] Hover 🖥️ → tooltip appears
- [ ] Narrow browser window → fewer emojis visible, ••• stays visible
- [ ] Widen window fully → all emojis visible, ••• hidden, 🖥️ still visible
- [ ] Confirm no 🎉 or 👏 anywhere
- [ ] Check conference mode toggle → emoji bar hides, conference grid shows; back to workshop → emoji bar returns correctly

- [ ] Commit:

```bash
git add static/participant.html static/participant.js static/participant.css
git commit -m "feat(emoji): responsive overflow bar with ••• popup, ping always-on, usage reordering"
git push origin victorrentea/emoji-overflow-dots
```
